title: Epilogue couch — Ginger blanket biscuit candy split
prompt:
Cast (Halloween night):
- @Sara: fairy princess — silver tiara, pink-white tutu, wings, wand, jack-o-lantern bucket. Wavy dark-blonde hair.
- @Eva: pumpkin onesie — orange body w/ jack-o-lantern face on tummy, green leaf hat, pumpkin bucket. Curly blonde.
- @Mama: cozy chaperone — burnt-orange beanie + sweater, mustard pants, kid-flashlight. Blonde hair.
- @Joe: cream-gold Pomeranian dog in red-and-black-spotted ladybug body costume.
- @Ginger: Jack Russell dog (white + tan ginger patches), tiny pumpkin-orange cape.

Camera: slow dolly push, eye-level, opening medium-wide inside the cozy living room.

Scene: @front_house_fall living-room interior — soft beige couch with autumn-orange throw blanket, warm orange floor lamp glow, paper jack-o-lanterns on a side table, a small bowl of chocolate bars and gold-foil chocolates on the coffee table, soft beige rug under the coffee table.

0:0-0:2 — Slow dolly push, medium-wide eye-level. @Sara center-left sitting on the couch, candy bucket beside her left thigh, chocolate bar in her right hand at chest height; @Eva center-right beside Sara with autumn-orange throw blanket draped across her lap and around @Ginger softly cradled in her lap; @Mama center-back softly standing behind the couch between the girls, both hands resting softly on the cushions; @Joe curled softly on the rug at Eva's feet in his bug curl.

0:2-0:4 — Slow tilt down to @Ginger in Eva's lap. @Eva softly offers a tiny tan dog biscuit from her right hand at Ginger's chest height. @Ginger softly takes it in her mouth in a gentle in-place small bite, tail wagging from under the blanket.

0:4-0:6 — Slow tilt up to @Mama. @Mama, warm and tender: "What an adventure, my pumpkins."

0:6-0:8 — Slow pan left to @Sara. @Mama softly lowers her right hand from the cushion behind Sara to gently rest on Sara's left shoulder. @Sara softly tilts her head toward Mama's hand with a content tired smile. @Sara: "Best Halloween EVER, Mama."

0:8-1:0 — Slow pull back to opening medium-wide. @Eva softly strokes @Ginger's head once. @Eva, looking softly down at @Ginger: "Ginger is HOME." @Joe wags his tail faster from his rug spot.

Lighting: warm orange floor-lamp glow, soft cozy living-room ambiance.
Style: Pixar 3D feature-render, cinematic kid-show, NOT scary.
negativePrompt: duplicate character, twin, clone, two of the same, mirrored figure, second father, two Papa, identical adults, second mother, two Mama, papa visible, papa in this clip, third child, second sister, second sara, second eva, two eva, duplicate eva, three girls, fourth child, fifth child, additional children, extra child in background, ghost figure, ghost kid, ghost children, shadow children, shadow of person, mirrored children, mirror reflection, family members in the background, strangers, crowd, group of people, other faces, background people, friends, neighbors, extra neighbors, third dog, second pomeranian, two joe, two ginger, second jack russell, ghost dog, three arms, third arm, extra arm, extra hand, floating hand, anatomy error, scary face, frightening expression, horror lighting, scary monster, real monster, monstrous teeth, fangs, claws, ginger lunging, ginger biting hard, ginger snapping, papa angry, papa thundering shout, papa apoplectic, papa rage face, intense yelling, blood, red liquid, red splatter, red stain, red biscuit, red dog treat, red foil chocolate, red wrapped candy, gore, injury, ginger injured, ginger bloody, scary, violent, distressing, motion lines, action lines, dust trails, speed lines, motion blur, papa with hair, papa not bald, eva with brown hair, eva with red hair, eva brunette, sara in ponytail, sara with straight hair, morphing, flickering, disfigured, distorted, extra face, unstable motion, papa standing still, papa motionless, papa idle, papa observing without acting, papa waiting passively, joe airborne, joe leaping, ginger airborne, ginger leaping, sara airborne, eva airborne, kids running, mama running, sara crying, eva crying, ginger as fox, ginger as deer, dutch angle, handheld shake, whip pan, jump cut
cameraStyle: slow dolly push to medium-wide, slow tilt down to Ginger and biscuit, slow tilt up to Mama, slow pan left to Sara and Mama's hand on shoulder, capped by a slow pull back
closingFrame: Cozy living-room medium-wide at @front_house_fall — @Sara center-left on the couch with chocolate bar in right hand; @Eva center-right with autumn-orange throw blanket across her lap and @Ginger cradled in her lap finishing the tiny tan biscuit; @Mama center-back softly behind the couch with right hand on Sara's left shoulder; @Joe curled on the rug at Eva's feet in bug costume, tail mid-wag; warm orange floor-lamp glow.
